name: Molecule

phase_0.boundary_condition: The molecular boundary enclosing the total electron cloud and defining the physical extent of the system

VINIT.justification: Represents the void state of unbound atoms before any orbital overlap or interaction occurs.

TANCH.justification: Forms the closed terminal boundary that contains the entire molecular system and defines its physical extent.

AFWD.justification: Acts as the forward morphism driving electron density into the bonding region to lower system energy.

AREV.justification: Acts as the reverse morphism pushing electron density away from the internuclear region to raise system energy.

CLINK.justification: Chains the atomic nuclei and shared electron pairs into a sequential and stable structural framework.

IMSCRIB.justification: Establishes the reflexive recognition of the bonded system as a distinct chemical entity.

FSPLIT.justification: Splits the initial interacting atomic orbitals into two distinct quantum paths consisting of bonding and antibonding molecular orbitals.

FFUSE.justification: Reconstitutes the original interacting atomic orbitals exactly from the bonding and antibonding molecular orbitals.

EVALT.justification: Represents the affirmative and stable ground state where electron density is concentrated between nuclei.

EVALF.justification: Represents the negative and unstable excited state where a node forms between nuclei.

ENGAGR.justification: Holds the paradice of simultaneous localized and delocalized electron density without collapsing into a single classical structure.

IFIX.justification: Records the final molecular geometry permanently into an append only solid state structure.

phase_3.void_description: Unbound isolated atoms with zero orbital overlap and undefined molecular geometry.
phase_3.true_description: Constructive interference yielding a stable bonding orbital with concentrated internuclear electron density.
phase_3.false_description: Destructive interference yielding an unstable antibonding orbital with an internuclear node.
phase_3.both_description: Resonance superposition where bonding and antibonding characters are held simultaneously in a delocalized pi system.

steps.domain_action: Initialize isolated atomic orbitals in the void state before any interaction.
Split the interacting atomic orbitals into bonding and antibonding molecular orbital paths.
Affirm the bonding molecular orbital as the stable ground state.
Apply forward morphism for constructive orbital overlap and energy lowering.
Chain the bonding orbital with the nuclear framework to form a covalent bond.
Establish the molecular identity as a reflexive bonded system.
Negate the antibonding molecular orbital as the unstable excited state.
Apply reverse morphism for destructive orbital phase inversion and energy raising.
Fuse the bonding and antibonding molecular orbitals back into the original atomic orbitals.
Enter a paradice state of resonance holding delocalized electron density without resolution.
Fix the final molecular geometry into a permanent crystalline lattice record.
Anchor the system at the molecular boundary closing the physical extent.

phase_5.compiler_frontend: Schrodinger equation solver translating quantum intentions into orbital operations
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: Electron exchange and orbital overlap mediating communication between atomic centers
phase_5.memory_mechanism: Electron density matrix storing the quantum state and phase information
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: Variational principle minimizing total energy to determine orbital occupation order
phase_5.alfs_store: Periodic table of elements and fundamental quantum mechanical constants

phase_6.cycle_cost: Photonic energy or thermal kinetic energy exchanged during state transitions
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: Isolated atoms with high configurational entropy and unbound electron clouds
phase_6.post_cycle_state: Bound molecule with defined geometry and released binding energy
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — the reversible linear combination of atomic orbitals conserves quantum information and phase space volume

lean_scaffold:
-- IGProtocol scaffold: VINIT → FSPLIT → EVALT → AFWD → CLINK → IMSCRIB → EVALF → AREV → FFUSE → ENGAGR → IFIX → TANCH
-- Class: Molecule
-- Fingerprint: sig=(6,2,3,1)
--   self_ref=False | frobenius_order=1
--   dialetheia_complete=True | period=12
-- Expected tier: O₂
-- FSPLIT/FFUSE pairs: [(1, 8)]

import Imscribing.IGMorphism
import Imscribing.IGFunctor

namespace Imscribing
open Primitives Frobenius IGProtocol
open Dimensionality Topology Relational Polarity Grammar
     Fidelity KineticChar Granularity Criticality Protection Stoichiometry Chirality

-- ── Token → IG field mapping ──────────────────────────────────────────────
--   [0] VINIT     dim    := 𐑼               𐑼 → 𐑚  | initial object — ground of distinction
--   [1] FSPLIT    gran   := 𐑚               𐑚 → 𐑚  | split δ — range decomposition
--   [2] EVALT     crit   := ⊙               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-true — criticality gate open
--   [3] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑚 → 𐑙  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [4] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑚 → 𐑙  | composition — regime coherence
--   [5] IMSCRIB   gram   := 𐑠               𐑚 → 𐑙  | identity — self-imscription
--   [6] EVALF     chir   := 𐑖               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-false — chirality check
--   [7] AREV      pol    := 𐑗               𐑚 → 𐑙  | reverse morphism — parity flip
--   [8] FFUSE     stoi   := 𐑙               𐑙 → 𐑳  | fuse μ — assembly mode
--   [9] ENGAGR    stoi   := 𐑳               𐑙 → 𐑭  | engage paradox — B-state, both arms
--   [10] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑳 → 𐑡  | irreversible fixation — winding number
--   [11] TANCH     top    := 𐑡               𐑭 → 𐑼  | terminal object — connectivity boundary

-- ── Main IGProtocol term ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

noncomputable def molecule_protocol : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  .withGram 𐑠 <|
  -- Seq chain:
  (.arrow 𐑼 𐑼 𐑚)  -- [0] VINIT | dim := 𐑼 | initial object — ground of distinction (Initialize isolated atomic orbitals in the void state before any interaction.)
  -- FSPLIT [1] (gran := 𐑚) (Split the interacting atomic orbitals into bonding and antibonding molecular orbital paths.) / FFUSE [8] (stoi := 𐑙)
  .seq
    (.prod
      -- T-branch (4 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [2] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (Affirm the bonding molecular orbital as the stable ground state.)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑾 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [3] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (Apply forward morphism for constructive orbital overlap and energy lowering.)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑱 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [4] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (Chain the bonding orbital with the nuclear framework to form a covalent bond.)
        (.arrow 𐑠 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [5] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (Establish the molecular identity as a reflexive bonded system.)
      -- F-branch (2 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑖 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [6] EVALF | chir := 𐑖 | evaluate-false — chirality check (Negate the antibonding molecular orbital as the unstable excited state.)
        (.arrow 𐑗 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [7] AREV | pol := 𐑗 | reverse morphism — parity flip (Apply reverse morphism for destructive orbital phase inversion and energy rai...))
    -- reconnect at FFUSE [8]: μ closes the Frobenius pair
    (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑳)  -- [8] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 (Fuse the bonding and antibonding molecular orbitals back into the original atomic orbitals.)
  (.arrow 𐑳 𐑙 𐑭)  -- [9] ENGAGR | stoi := 𐑳 | engage paradox — B-state, both arms (Enter a paradice state of resonance holding delocalized electron density with...)
  (.arrow 𐑭 𐑳 𐑡)  -- [10] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (Fix the final molecular geometry into a permanent crystalline lattice record.)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑭 𐑼)  -- [11] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (Anchor the system at the molecular boundary closing the physical extent.)

-- ── Evaluation arm sub-defs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

-- truth arm
noncomputable def molecule_true_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (molecule_protocol).restrictToEVALT

-- false arm
noncomputable def molecule_false_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (molecule_protocol).restrictToEVALF

-- ── Verification theorems ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

theorem molecule_tier : TierFunctor.obj 𐑼 = .O₂ := by decide

-- Frobenius (split → fuse): μ∘δ = id on .prod branch
-- Proof: apply igFrobAlg_self_fusion; exact mu_delta_A_id
-- (requires mu_delta_A_id from IGFunctor library)

end Imscribing
